endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/microsoft.insights/alertrules
endpoints.description: List the alert rules within a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/alertrules
endpoints.description: List the alert rules within a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/alertrules/{ruleName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{RULENAME}} with a real rulename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/alertrules/{ruleName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates an alert rule.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{RULENAME}} with a real rulename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/alertrules/{ruleName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{RULENAME}} with a real rulename.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/alertrules/{ruleName}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing AlertRuleResource. To update other fields use the CreateOrUpdate method.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{RULENAME}} with a real rulename.
